Advanced Hunting Incidents
DeviceProcessEvents | where ProcessCommandLine contains "mimikatz" | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine | limit 50
Last 30 days
Timestamp DeviceName AccountName ProcessCommandLine
2026-04-10T09:00:00Z WORKSTATION-03 jsmith cmd.exe /c mimikatz.exe
2026-04-10T09:01:00Z SERVER-DC01 admin-svc powershell -enc base64...
2026-04-10T09:02:00Z LAPTOP-07 sarah.chen mimikatz.exe sekurlsa::logonpasswords
